dropzone.title: Select photos to upload
dropzone.subtitle: Drag and drop your photos here, or click to select them
dropzone.formats: Accepted formats: JPG, JPEG, PNG, GIF

form.title: Title (optional)
form.title_placeholder: Add a title for all photos
form.title_help: The file name will be used if no title is specified

visibility.title: Visibility
visibility.help: Private photos won't appear on the map. You can change this setting anytime from the gallery.

error.no_files: Please select at least one photo to upload
error.partial_upload: There were issues uploading some images. Please try again
error.upload_failed: Error uploading images. Please check your connection and try again

zip.title: Import photos from ZIP file
zip.description: Upload a ZIP file with your photos to import them in bulk
zip.success_message: The ZIP file has been uploaded successfully and is being processed. Photos will appear in your gallery when processing is complete.
zip.processing: This process may take several minutes depending on the file size
zip.help_text: Select a ZIP file containing your photos

error.invalid_file: Please select a valid ZIP file
error.no_file: Please select a ZIP file to upload

result.duplicate_message: You already have an identical photo in your collection
